fusion_health_http: GET /api/fusion/health includes usd_px (same keys; gate invariant via probe_fusion_health_json)
self_probe_http: GET /api/fusion/self-probe includes same usd_px fragment (plus DOM when bridge attached)
mcp_wasm_dom_probe: get_wasm_dom_probe JSON includes top-level usd_px (UsdPxrProbe.usdPxHealthPayload) alongside wasm_surface / wasm_runtime / openusd
mac_gate: scripts/run_fusion_mac_app_gate.py: probe_fusion_health_json requires usd_px (no extra self-probe HTTP for USD)
ui_torsion: FusionUiTorsion.score01 uses 4 factors: klein_bottle_closed, wasm_surface.closed, fusion_tsx_surface.closed, usd_px invariant
release_smoke: cells/fusion/scripts/run_gaiafusion_release_smoke.sh — env: GAIAFUSION_SKIP_XCTEST, GAIAFUSION_SKIP_WORKING_APP_VERIFY, GAIAFUSION_SKIP_USD_PROBE_CLI, GAIAFUSION_USD_PROBE_SIGKILL_OK (rc 137 PARTIAL witness); receipt gaiafusion_release_smoke_receipt.json
working_app_verify_xctest: scripts/verify_gaiafusion_working_app.sh: GAIAFUSION_INCLUDE_XCTEST=1 runs swift test --disable-sandbox (same USD bundle rationale as release smoke)
operator_fusion_mesh_closure: scripts/run_operator_fusion_mesh_closure.sh phase 6 calls verify_gaiafusion_working_app.sh — env passthrough documented in script header
host_mac_skip_lock: scripts/lib/gaiafusion_host_c4_lock.sh — Darwin arm64 non-CI clears GAIAFUSION_SKIP_* / SIGKILL-ok unless GAIAFUSION_ALLOW_SKIP_ON_HOST=1; sourced by run_gaiafusion_release_smoke.sh, run_operator_fusion_mesh_closure.sh, run_mac_cell_autonomous_closure.sh, verify_gaiafusion_working_app.sh
usd_runtime_link_verify: scripts/verify_gaiafusion_usd_runtime_link.sh — otool @rpath USD_Core + framework on disk; .app inputs require Contents/Frameworks/USD_Core.framework; run_gaiafusion_release_smoke.sh, build_gaiafusion_release.sh, package_gaiafusion_app.sh
fusion_mac_app_gate_python: scripts/run_fusion_mac_app_gate.py — enforce_host_c4_lock() at import (same keys as gaiafusion_host_c4_lock.sh; GAIAFUSION_ALLOW_SKIP_ON_HOST=1 opts out)
gaiafusion_app_packaging: scripts/package_gaiafusion_app.sh — ditto USD_Core.framework, inject Versions/A/Resources/Info.plist for valid codesign bundle, sign libtbb + USD_Core + framework + app, verify_gaiafusion_usd_runtime_link.sh, optional hdiutil; build_gaiafusion_release.sh when GAIAFUSION_PACKAGE_APP=1
note: UsdProbeCLI / swift test (xctest-helper) may be SIGKILL in IDE sandbox; host Mac should run run_usd_probe_cli.sh and swift test for C4.
package_platforms: .macOS(.v26) aligned with USD_Core minos 26.0; ld mismatch warning eliminated vs prior .v14.
swift6_concurrency: NATSMCPBridge Probe @unchecked Sendable; PlantKindsCatalog Sendable; AppCoordinator nonisolated(unsafe) Combine/Task; LocalServer SendableBox; LocalServerAPITests async setUp/tearDown + waitUntilServerResponds(port:)
